title: Your Local Floridians' Better Multiplayer
description: Your Local Floridians’ Better Multiplayer aims to make a lightweight, immersive vanilla+ experience which is fun for a group.
body:
# Your Local Floridians' Better Multiplayer

### A modpack made to make vanilla+ (with a sprinkle of RPG) better for multiplayer with:
1. Better world generation
2. Different seasons
3. New and revamped structures
4. More building block options from the Chipped mod
5. New item and block customizations
6. Lightweight mods that can run on all devices
7. More forms of transportation
8. An immerisve experience (not in the Lite version)
9. New bosses to track down and defeat
10. An drastically increased portfolio of weapons and armors

## Trailer
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/RAb8mN_yM54" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Server Mods:
  
  For adding this modpack to a server, download the server pack version. it should always be the third to newest version of the game. From there all you have to do is replace your server's "mods" and "config" files with the modpack's version of those files.

Known Issues:
1. Game crashes when you reload/change the texture packs while in a server.
2. Game crashes when you disble Distant Horizons while in a server or enter a server with Distant Horizons enabled.
3. Worlds made in version 1.6.0 and older do not work in 1.7.0 and later.
4. In 1.8.1, Looking at a flecting table will put a minecart on th players head.

*WARNING: ALL SETTINGS ARE AUTOMATICALLY SET TO MAX, IN THE FULL VERSION*
